summary: MEGA PROMPT #35: Pilot Agency Onboarding Wizard & Dashboard - All tests PASS. Backend: 15/15 tests passed covering full 9-step wizard flow (create agency, supplier/accounting credentials, connection/search/booking/invoice/accounting/reconciliation tests) + read endpoints (agencies, metrics, incidents) + auth protection + duplicate prevention. Frontend: Both pages render correctly - PilotSetupWizardPage shows 9-step indicator with form elements, PilotOnboardingDashboardPage displays 4 KPI sections (Platform Health, Financial Flow, Pilot Usage, Incident Monitoring) with agencies table.
critical_code_review_comments: pilot_flow_validator.py: Well-structured service with clear flow separation for each wizard step. Uses randomized simulation for sandbox/simulation modes - appropriate for pilot testing phase.
pilot_onboarding_router.py: Clean REST API design with proper Pydantic models, role-based auth (super_admin/admin), and consistent error handling.
PilotSetupWizardPage.jsx: Good use of data-testid attributes for testing. Step indicator and form validation present. Wizard state management is clean.
PilotOnboardingDashboardPage.jsx: All 4 KPI sections implemented with proper data-testid attributes. Dashboard fetches both /metrics and /agencies endpoints on load.
seed_data_creation: Created test agency: TEST_PilotAgency_* (cleaned up after test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pilot Onboarding (MEGA PROMPT #35) fully tested. All 12 API endpoints working: POST /api/pilot/onboarding/setup (step1), PUT .../setup/supplier (step2), PUT .../setup/accounting (step3), POST .../test-connection (step4), POST .../test-search (step5), POST .../test-booking (step6), POST .../test-invoice (step7), POST .../test-accounting (step8), POST .../test-reconciliation (step9), GET .../agencies, GET .../metrics, GET .../incidents. Frontend pages at /app/admin/pilot-wizard and /app/admin/pilot-onboarding both render correctly. Flow tests use SIMULATED data (sandbox mode) - not real supplier APIs.

mocked_apis.pilot_flow_tests: SIMULATION MODE - All flow tests (connection, search, booking, invoice, accounting, reconciliation) use randomized simulation responses in sandbox/simulation mode. This is by design for the pilot phase.
mocked_apis.supplier_integration: NOT connected to real suppliers - simulation only
mocked_apis.accounting_integration: NOT connected to real accounting providers - simulation only

features_tested.step1_agency_create: PASS - Creates pilot agency with name, email, phone, tax_id, mode
features_tested.step1_duplicate_prevention: PASS - Returns 400 error for duplicate agency name
features_tested.step5_search_test: PASS - Runs test search with Antalya destination (simulated)
features_tested.step9_reconciliation: PASS - Runs reconciliation check (booking vs invoice vs accounting)
features_tested.list_agencies: PASS - Returns agencies list with status summary
features_tested.metrics_dashboard: PASS - Returns 4 KPI sections with proper structure
features_tested.frontend_wizard: PASS - Renders 9-step indicator, form elements, navigation
features_tested.frontend_dashboard: PASS - Renders 4 KPI sections, agencies table, incidents card
